utilities.note: electric + water + internet; heating in winter

diningOut.note: local restaurants and cafes; good value

transit.note: metro + bus monthly pass very cheap

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Peak tourist months get higher multipliers.

evidence.quote: Plan for approximately $1,171/month as a digital nomad in Sofia, covering coworking, accommodation, food, and local transport

evidence.claim: coworking €130–€200/mo; fast internet and growing nomad community
evidence.quote: Coworking memberships cost €130-200 monthly, and Sofia offers reliable high-speed internet and numerous coworking spaces

evidence.claim: most digital nomads live comfortably on €1,200–1,400/mo all-in
evidence.quote: most digital nomads live comfortably on €1,200-1,400 monthly in Sofia, including accommodation, food, coworking, and entertainment

evidence.claim: Sofia 74% cheaper than NYC; flat 10% income tax
evidence.quote: Sofia is 74% cheaper than New York City, and Sofia provides reliable coworking spaces, fast internet
